package.brief: HH the Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received Pakistani Prime Minister HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday to review bilateral relations and regional developments.

article.headline: HH the Amir Receives Pakistani Prime Minister at Amiri Diwan
article.body:
HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of Pakistan, at the Amiri Diwan on Saturday.

The talks reviewed bilateral relations and ways to expand cooperation between the two countries. Regional developments in the Middle East were also discussed.

package.instagram_caption: HH the Amir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani received HE Mr Shehbaz Sharif, Prime Minister of Pakistan, at the Amiri Diwan. The meeting reviewed bilateral relations and regional developments. #Qatar #Pakistan #Diplomacy #AmiriDiwan

package.brief: Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art has opened a new exhibition titled 'Resolutions' to mark 15 years since the museum's establishment, as announced by Qatar Museums.

article.headline: Mathaf Opens 'Resolutions' Exhibition Marking 15 Years of the Museum
article.body:
Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art has opened a new exhibition titled 'Resolutions' to mark 15 years since the museum's establishment, Qatar Museums announced.

The exhibition runs from 10 June and is on display at the museum in Education City.

According to the museum, 'Resolutions' examines Mathaf's foundation through four defining areas: its origins under Sheikh Hassan bin Mohammed bin Ali Al Thani, its exhibition history since opening in 2010, its engagement with knowledge circulation in the Arab world, and its educational programmes.

The museum said the show draws on works from its permanent collection. Entry is free for all visitors, and Qatar Museums said accompanying public talks and guided tours will be held during the exhibition period.

package.instagram_caption: Mathaf: Arab Museum of Modern Art celebrates 15 years with the new exhibition 'Resolutions'. Explore the museum's foundation, history, and educational programmes through works from its permanent collection. Free entry at Education City. #Mathaf #QatarMuseums #ArtExhibition #Doha #ModernArt #EducationCity

package.brief: The Ministry of Public Health has launched a summer mosquito-control programme using drones and biological fish-based larvicide across 18 districts, coordinated with the Ministry of Municipality and running through October.

article.headline: Ministry of Public Health Launches Summer Mosquito-Control Programme
article.body:
**Doha, Qatar:** The Ministry of Public Health (MoPH) has launched a summer mosquito-control programme, deploying drones and biological fish-based larvicide across 18 districts to control mosquito populations.

The programme is coordinated with the Ministry of Municipality and will run through October.

Public-health vigilance during summer is a shared responsibility, according to the MoPH Director of Communicable Diseases.

package.instagram_caption: The Ministry of Public Health has launched a summer mosquito-control programme using drones and biological fish-based larvicide across 18 districts. The initiative, coordinated with the Ministry of Municipality, runs through October. #Qatar #PublicHealth #MosquitoControl #SummerSafety #MoPH

package.brief: The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, featuring sessions on school leadership, digital learning, and student wellbeing.

article.headline: Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 Concludes in Doha
article.body:
The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, organisers said. The event brought together school leaders, educators and education-sector officials over its run.

Organisers said the programme featured sessions on school leadership, digital learning and student wellbeing.

The expo has now ended and is no longer accepting registrations. The listing remained on the live events page after the closing date and is being updated to reflect that the event has concluded.

package.instagram_caption: The Qatar Education Leadership Expo 2026 concluded in Doha on 24 May, bringing together school leaders, educators, and officials for sessions on school leadership, digital learning, and student wellbeing. #QatarEducation #LeadershipExpo #DohaEvents #EducationLeadership #DigitalLearning #StudentWellbeing

package.brief: Qatar Airways will resume flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan, from 15 July, expanding its global network to over 160 destinations this summer.

article.headline: Qatar Airways to Resume Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July
article.body:
Qatar Airways has announced it will resume flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan, starting 15 July.

The Helsinki route will operate four times weekly, increasing to daily from 1 August. Tokyo Haneda will receive four weekly flights from 15 July, complementing the existing Tokyo Narita service.

The expansion brings Qatar Airways' global network to over 160 destinations this summer, according to the airline.

package.instagram_caption: Qatar Airways is expanding its network! From 15 July, flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda resume, bringing the airline's global destinations to over 160 this summer. ✈️ #QatarAirways #Helsinki #TokyoHaneda #Aviation #TravelNews #Qatar
package.story_copy: Qatar Airways resumes flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July, expanding network to over 160 destinations.
package.push_notification: Qatar Airways resumes flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July
package.video_script:

Network now over 160 destinations.
